A EF-1 TORNADO CAUSED DAMAGES TO A HOUSE AND OUTBUILDINGS. PIECES OF THE OUTBUILDINGS WERE THROWN ACROSS A FIELD. THE ESTIMATED PEAK WIND SPEED WAS 100 MPH. THE PATH LENGTH WAS A HALF MILE AND THE PATH WIDTH WAS 300 YARDS.
AN EF1 TORNADO TOOK OFF THE SECOND FLOOR OF A HUNTING STRUCTURE. ESTIMATED PEAK WIND WAS 105 MPH. THE PATH LENGTH WAS A HALF MILE AND THE PATH WIDTH WAS 100 YARDS.
